title: Mayor Walsh Announces Release of 2025 City Services Guide
summary: Mayor Walsh announced the 2025 City Services Guide will be mailed to Syracuse residents starting December 30, 2024. The guide, produced by the Department of Public Works, provides residents with service schedules, contact information, and instructions for trash/recycling, sidewalk maintenance, and sewer services. The city is promoting Cityline as the primary digital service request platform for non-emergency requests.

political_signal.description: Mayor emphasizes constituent access to city services and community engagement through improved communication channels and digital tools.
